entities.name: Mirael

attributes.role: ablator sapientie, sciencie, cognicionis, et artis
attributes.action: dilute and abolish mind, sense, discretion, and thought

entities.raw_quote: Subintret Mirael cerebrum tuum et omnem sapienciam, sensum, discrecionem, [et] cogitationem diluat et aboleat.

entities.name: Oreoth, Pinen, Ocel, Tryboy, Noryoth, Belferith, Camoy, Astaroth, Sobronoy, Sismael
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos decem demones [6v] malignos, videlicet Oreoth, Pinen, Ocel, Tryboy, Noryoth, Belferith, Camoy, Astaroth, Sobronoy, Sismael

entities.name: Tubal, Sathan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus
entities.raw_quote: nomined istorum sex spirituum calidorum, videlicet Tubal, Sathan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus

entities.name: Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brulo, Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid, Mascifin, Nartim, Lodoni
entities.raw_quote: Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brulo, Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid, Mascifin, Nartim, et Lodoni

entities.name: Pumeon, Terminas (or Termines), Peripaos, Midam (or Midain), Fabni (or Fabin), Gebel, Darail (or Dorayl), Vmeloth, Thereoth (or Tereoth), Byreoth (or Bireoth)
entities.raw_quote: sculpes hoc nomen ‘Dyacom’; in pectore eius hec tria nomina, scilicet ‘Punicon’, ‘Terminas’, et ‘Peripaos’

entities.name: Cartutay, Momabel, Sobil, Geteritacon
entities.raw_quote: sculpire nomen vnius cum hiis... Cartutay, Momabel, Sobil, et Geteritacon

entities.name: Puzanil, Pimaton, Folfitoy, Mansator
entities.raw_quote: et altero, nomen alt[erius] et hec nomina, scilicet Puzanil, Pimaton, Folfitoy, et Mansator

entities.name: Apolyn, Gebel, Astaroth, Tereol, Falmar, Tyroces
white dove
entities.raw_quote: primus debes habere quandam columbam totam albam

entities.name: paper from female dog

attributes.description: carta factam de cane femina dum est in amore

entities.raw_quote: et cartam factam de cane femina dum est in amore

entities.name: silver or tin
entities.raw_quote: habeas argentum siue stagnum, et ad ignem decola.

relationships.from: Tubal, Sathan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus

summary: This chunk details four distinct magical operations: causing loss of senses via Mirael, arousing a woman's love using animal parts and spirits, gaining dignity through carved stones and silver, and inciting enmity between friends using inscribed stones and sulfur.
key_passages: Subintret Mirael cerebrum tuum et omnem sapienciam, sensum, discrecionem, [et] cogitationem diluat et aboleat.
Sicut tu, Sathan, et tu, Reuces, estis scripti in hac ymagine facta nomine talis, ita continuo affligatis brachia ista sua vt aliquid facere nequeat sed me amplecti desideret.
Ego, talis, volens talem graciam obtinere et ab eo venerari, semper honorari, similiter et timeri
Coniuro vos spiritus inimicissimos, per eterni dei gloriam, quod inter talem et talem... quantum odium inter vos est, tantum inter ipsos seminetis et inseratis.
